concept: Survival is a real-time strategy base-building game with hero collection elements set in a zombie apocalypse, where players construct and upgrade their base, recruit and train diverse heroes, and engage in both PvE and PvP combat. Core gameplay involves managing resources to build and research technologies, deploying heroes with unique skills in automated battles against zombies on a world map, and attacking or defending against other players' bases.
name: Last War:Survival
